entry.title: Related to exam (SAP Certified - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, Financial Accounting)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have my SAP certification exam in 2 days and wanted to ask those who have recently taken the exam about the new certification exam format.

How was your experience with the new format? Are the questions mostly scenario-based, and is it manageable for beginners who have mainly practiced configuration and basic concepts?

Any last-minute preparation tips to clear the exam on the first attempt would be really helpful.

Thank you in advance!

#SAP #SAPCertification #SAPFICO #SAPLearning #SAPHANA #SAPCommunity #FinanceTransformation #SAPConsultant #S4HANA

entry.title: Unable to purchase additional Learning Hub subscriptions in SAPforMe and SAP Store
entry.content:
We are currently unable to purchase additional Learning Hub subscriptions for our consultants via SAPforMe in the Cloud Contracts area.  I have also tried going directly to the SAP Store and purchasing them (see attached screenshot), but get this error when attempting to submit the order:  The referenced contract item is outdated. Please remove the item from your cart, go back to SAP for Me and add it again. (Error Code: VAL_0028)

Per SAP Note 3318975 this is a known issue that was reported on 9 March.  I created a support request for the SAP Store back on 6 March with no response.  I've also created a support ticket via SAPforMe, but no update either.  This is the second time in a month that I've had issues with Learning Hub subscription purchasing.

Reaching out to the community to see if anyone has found a work around for this.  I have consultants waiting and need the subscription to complete Certification Exams for active customer projects.

Thanks!

entry.title: Inquiry Regarding Exam Booking Availability for C_FIOAD
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,
I am interested in scheduling the C_FIOAD certification exam. However, when I attempt to book the exam, but the Exam  is not yet available for booking.

Can anybody help me with the Information, when the C_FIOAD exam will be available for scheduling? I would appreciate any information regarding the expected timeline for booking availability.
Thank you in Advacne

Kind regards,
Venkata Nagendra Reddy Vardhireddy

entry.title: Issue During SAP SuccessFactors AI Role Certification Exam – Stuck on Scoring Screen
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to report a technical issue I experienced during my SAP SuccessFactors AI Role Certification exam.

After completing all questions, I submitted my answers and proceeded to the scoring phase. However, the system became stuck on the scoring/loading screen and did not progress for an extended period of time. Despite waiting, the exam eventually ended with a “time up” status, and I was marked as failed.

I would like to clarify that I had already submitted all my responses and was in the scoring stage when this issue occurred. Therefore, this appears to be a system-related problem rather than an issue with my exam attempt.

I have already submitted a support ticket through SAP Learning, and I also have a backup file of my responses.

Has anyone experienced a similar issue, or is there any additional action I should take to ensure this is properly reviewed?

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: Question About Certification Requirement for Access to EC Provisioning
entry.content:
Hi all,
I would like to ask one question regarding SAP SuccessFactors certifications.
If a person obtains the following certification, would they be eligible to access the EC implementation Provisioning environment?

SAP Certified - SAP SuccessFactors Platform: Reporting (C_THR92)

We are currently considering the priority order of certifications for our internal team members, so I would appreciate it if you could kindly confirm this when you have a chance.

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: I am Unable to take the assessment test on Learninghub.
entry.content:
I am unable to purchase the LearningHub to take my Assessment Test, one of my Certification is heading close to expire (28-03-2026).
Error Code: VAL_0003
Erroe code: DCPCPS_015

am sharing the screenshots, please guide me with proper steps before it is too late.
SAP SuccessFactors Learning SAP Learning Hub Certification

entry.title: Error when taking AI-based exam - waiting for reply from support for 3 weeks
entry.content:
Hello there,
I am unable to take the new AI-based exam. After the yoodli.ai frame has loaded clicking on the "Sign in with Learning SSO" button I get the error message "Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support if the issue persists. Please try again or contact your organisation admin."

I opened a ticket with support 3 weeks ago and I am yet to receive a (non-automated) response.
Has anybody else experienced this issue? What else can I try?
To be honest I am a little bit disappointed with the support so far, I had expected more of a "Hypercare" period after rolling out this new system.
Thanks and Kind regards, C.

entry.title: CERTIFICATION EXAM ERROR
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm receiving the following error when trying to take the certification exam. My 24-hour period has started, but I can't access the exam. I urgently request your support.

entry.title: Test and certitfication of third party CMIS inplementation
entry.content:
Dear community,

we as a DMS vendor are developing a CMIS API so that our customers can archive their documents via our external CMIS Repository out of SAP S/4Hana on premise installations. Public and private cloud may follow later on.

Our questions are:

  1. Are there any tools and/or test specification provided by SAP to test our implementation for SAP S/4Hana on premise?
  2. Is there a test specification including in and output parameters provided by SAP to test our implementation for SAP S/4Hana on premise?
  3. Is it possible to certify our CMIS API for SAP S/4Hana on premise installations?

Best regards,
Michael

entry.title: SAP Certified - Implementation Consultant Asset Management (EAM)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I recently tried 1 attempt to my Exame to become a SAP Certified - Implementation Consultant for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, Asset Management, my score was 50% and the cut score is 70%. It was my first time trying this kind of exam and the system does not give you a feedback where you should improve or what part of the exam you was worse. I'd like to know if some of you have tried the new format exam and how was your experience? If I perform more things that the exame ask me to do, Will I be penalized?
Best regards.

entry.title: Practice System is full right now, but no worries... spots will open soon. Keep trying!
entry.content:
Hi

While trying to access Hands-on Practice for Intermediate ABAP Programming(S4D401) and Hands-on Practice for Data Modelling in ABAP Dictionary and ABAP Core Data Services(S4D430), I am getting the below error message

Temporarily unavailable

The Practice System is full right now, but no worries... spots will open soon. Keep trying!

Kindly let me know how long it will take for sap to provide access systems as I have to finish the modules for certification purpose.

entry.title: SAP Certification Exam bundle purchase - Checkout Error - VAL_0101
entry.content:
Hi,
I am trying to purchase SAP Certification Exams bundle (2 attempts). However it gives me an error "We encountered an issue with your order. (Error Code: VAL_0101)" on the Place Order page. I have tried to do this through SAP Store and otherwise also but it doesn't proceed further. 

NOTE: On the earlier suggestion on a separate post by another community member, about accepting B2B Terms and Conditions, there is no option/place to "Accept" or "Agree". The only options available are "Print" and "Close"

Regards

entry.title: Failed to enroll
entry.content:
When I try to take the "SAP Certified - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, Financial Accounting" test, I get the message "Failed to enroll
An error occurred while enrolling. Please try again, if the issue continues contact support."
I cannot proceed any further.
Please tell me how to resolve this error.

entry.title: Unable to Assign SAP AI Core Service in BTP Trial for Generative AI Hub Learning Journey with subscr
entry.content:
Hi,

I am following the Learning Journey “Solving Business Problems using SAP's Generative AI Hub”,  there is a course called “Solve your business problems using prompts and LLMs in SAP Generative AI Hub”. One of the chapters, “Developing Prompts Using Generative AI Hub,” includes a lesson titled “Getting Started with Generative AI Hub.”

I have successfully:

  • Created and accessed a BTP global trial account
  • Logged in to my global account (PXXXXXXXXXX) and verified my subaccounts

However, I am unable to assign the SAP AI Core service via Entitlements. The service does not appear as assignable, even though I am logged into the global account. Which is acquired in order to complete the  “Getting Started with Generative AI Hub.” leasson.

This blocks me from completing:

  • Step 2: Set up Generative AI Hub in SAP AI Core to start consuming LLMs
  • Step 3: Connect to SAP AI Core Tools

My question:
👉 Is SAP AI Core available in BTP Trial accounts for this Learning Journey?
If yes:

  • What prerequisites are required to make SAP AI Core available in Entitlements?
  • Is a specific region, subaccount configuration, or account type required?

If no:

  • Is the Learning Journey outdated, or does it require a non-trial (paid) BTP account?

Any guidance on how to proceed would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

Kind regards,
Rabi Josefsson

entry.title: S4H00 Certification
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I've completed the S4H00 S4/HANA Overview course, and I was trying to find if there is a certification S4H00 in SAP Learning Hub.

Could you please let me know how can access to get the certification?

Thanks,

Chafik

SAP Learning Hub #S4H00

entry.title: C_IEE2E Exam registration in KSA 2026
entry.content:
Hello All, 

I have been trying to subscribe & register to :

1)C_IEE2E exam 

2)Learninghub full access 

I am based in Saudi Arabia , I cannot complete the purchase online due to regional restrictions. 

I have been trying to reach out to SAP team through emails = no replay.( Both HQ & MEA )

I am not sure there is logical reason stopping SAP from granting Individuals in MEA region same experience as anyone else located in US, EU etc.

I appreciate your time if you can help me out with this.

entry.title: Failed to enroll - system-based SAP Certification
entry.content: I was about to take to take the Sourcing and Procurement exam, but I got stuck into this error. Did anyone else have the same issue? If so, was it solved?

entry.title: Failed to enroll System Based Assessment
entry.content: I'm trying to start the certification assessment to C_THR85_2511, but when select the assessment to enroll is showing a fail message. I'm cleaned the cookies and cache. And tried in MS edge and google chrome but didn't works.

entry.title: Failed to enroll - SAP Certification
entry.content:
I just faced the enroll fail issue during my C_TS462_2601 – SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, Sales certification exam.

While still within the allowed time (countdown active), I suddenly received a message that my enrollment was removed, which immediately blocked me from continuing the exam. A SAP case has already been raised (Case Number: 5000330967).

This situation is concerning because the interruption was not caused by the candidate, and certification attempts are limited and costly. I strongly expect SAP to handle this case fairly and not consume the exam attempt due to a technical failure at SAP side. 

I expect that SAP Certification Team to review this case urgently and ensure a fair resolution.

Certification SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Sales SAP Learning Hub

entry.title: C_S4CS (SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition – Sales) How to best prepare for this exam ?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m planning to take the C_S4CS – SAP Certified Implementation Consultant (S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Sales) exam soon, but I’m honestly not sure what to expect and would really appreciate some real insights.

A few things I’m curious about:

  • What is the actual exam format like?
    (MCQs, multiple answers, scenario-based, etc.)
  • How difficult is it compared to other SAP certifications?
    Is it beginner-friendly or more implementation-heavy?
  • Are the questions more theory-based or real-world scenarios?
  • How important is hands-on experience with S/4HANA Cloud vs just studying Learning Hub content?
  • Any topics that are heavily tested?
  • Did you rely more on official SAP material, practice tests, or both

Also, if you’ve already passed:

  • What would you do differently if you had to prepare again?

Thank you.
